eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Wagoner, OK; at 10:44 AM on MAY 25, 2019 Effective until 11:44 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THE FOLLOWING MESSAGE IS BEING TRANSMITTED AT THE REQUEST OF WAGONER COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT. VERDIGRIS RIVER LEVELS ARE RISING AND ADDITIONAL FLOODING IMPACTS ARE EXPECTED IN SEVERAL COMMUNITIES INCLUDING OAK GROVE, OKAY, AND WYBARK. RESIDENTS IN THIS AREA SHOULD ACT NOW TO EVACUATE AWAY FROM LOW LYING AREAS AND STAY AWAY FROM RIVER BANKS...

A SHELTER FOR EVACUEES IS OPEN AT COWETA HIGH SCHOOL, LOCATED AT 14607 SOUTH 305TH E AVENUE. IF YOU HAVE AN EMERGENCY OR REQUIRE ASSISTANCE WITH EVACUATION. PLEASE CALL 9-1-1.
